Óliver Pérez

Position: Pitcher

Bats: Left  •  Throws: Left

6-3, 225lb (190cm, 102kg)

Born: August 15, 1981 in Culiacan, Mexico mx

High School: Cobales (Culiacan, Mexico)

Debut: June 16, 2002 (Age 20-305d, 18,095th in major league history)
   vs. SEA 5.0 IP, 4 H, 7 SO, 4 BB, 2 ER, W

Last Game: April 24, 2022 (Age 40-252d)
   vs. NYM 0.1 IP, 2 H, 0 SO, 0 BB, 0 ER

Rookie Status: Exceeded rookie limits during 2002 season

Agents: Boras Corporation

Full Name: Óliver Pérez

Nicknames: Ollie or El Paisa

Pronunciation: \AH-li-ver PAIR-ehz\

Frequently Asked Questions

How old is Óliver Pérez?

Óliver Pérez is 44 years old.

When was Óliver Pérez born?

Óliver Pérez was born on August 15, 1981.

Where was Óliver Pérez born?

Óliver Pérez was born in Culiacan, Mexico.

How tall is Óliver Pérez?

Óliver Pérez is 6-3 (190 cm) tall.

How much did Óliver Pérez weigh when playing?

Óliver Pérez weighed 225 lbs (102 kg) when playing.

How many seasons did Óliver Pérez play?

Óliver Pérez played 20 seasons.

Is Óliver Pérez in the Hall of Fame?

Óliver Pérez has not been elected into the Hall of Fame.

What position did Óliver Pérez play?

Óliver Pérez was a Pitcher.

How many strikeouts did Óliver Pérez have?

Óliver Pérez had 1,546 strikeouts over his career.

How many teams has Óliver Pérez played for?

Óliver Pérez played for 8 teams; the Arizona Diamondbacks, Cleveland Indians, Houston Astros, New York Mets, Pittsburgh Pirates, San Diego Padres, Seattle Mariners and Washington Nationals.

When did Óliver Pérez retire?

Óliver Pérez last played in 2022.

What are Óliver Pérez's nicknames?

Ollie, El Paisa are nicknames for Óliver Pérez.
